definitions.text: A drawing or diagram conveying information.
The representation of any form, as by drawing, painting, modelling, carving, embroidering, etc.; especially, a representation of the human body.
examples: a figure in bronze; a figure cut in marble

definitions.text: A person or thing representing a certain consciousness.
To calculate, to solve a mathematical problem.

examples: I can’t figure if he’s telling the truth or lying.

definitions.text: To think, to assume, to suppose, to reckon.
